## Before Posting

If this report includes exploit details, real user data, provider keys,
screenshots, recordings, or raw device logs, do not post those details publicly.
Follow [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) instead.

## Summary


## Affected Area

- [ ] Microphone/listening visibility
- [ ] TTS or recording state machine
- [ ] Screen data minimization
- [ ] Sensitive-field redaction
- [ ] AI response protocol validation
- [ ] Action execution or confirmation
- [ ] Backend proxy
